name: team-task-manager
description: Full-stack Team Task Manager built with Express, MongoDB, React, and Tailwind CSS.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix server --omit=dev && npm install --prefix client --include=dev && npm run build --prefix client
